name: Data & Analytics Research
student_summary: Push the methods of data science itself — in labs and R&D teams.
overview: Push the methods of data science itself — in labs and R&D teams. Data & Analytics Research sits in the Applied Sciences family of Science & Research. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You enjoy breaking problems into parts and reasoning them through
Numbers and patterns make sense to you
You keep asking why until you reach the bottom of things
who_should_avoid: You want a short, easy study path — this one demands years of serious preparation
Intense competition drains you — entry here is a contest
daily_responsibilities: Apply statistical theory to real problems
Collaborate with your team using experiment design
Keep improving at ml research — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Laboratories and research facilities with focused desk analysis
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
Strong earning ceiling (₹40 LPA+ at senior levels)
challenges: Fierce competition for the best seats and roles
A long, demanding preparation and learning curve
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Data & Analytics Research is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of experiment design
projects: Beginner: explore statistical theory with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Python
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Data & Artificial Intelligence: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Mathematics & Statistics: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Physics Research: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Data & Analytics Research pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹8 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹40 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Mathematics, Statistics. Typical degrees: B.Sc/B.Stat + M.Sc/M.Stat, PhD for research labs. Alternatives exist: integrated bs-ms at iisers.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Data & Analytics Research evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Data & Analytics Research is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
